typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Runtime wiring validation still relies on source-text scanning (`BackfillSchedulerTests.test_refreshAll_guardCondition_isPresent`) instead of executing `UsageAggregator.refreshAll/runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded` success/failure coexistence paths.
Backfill monotonic guard remains epsilon-based (`diff >= -epsilon`), which still permits bounded backward cursor movement and does not satisfy strict no-backward progression semantics.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce full 40-character commit SHA values in worker handoffs (not short hashes), and validate this during scrutiny.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for `m4-fix-backfill-commit-coupled-advancement-and-runtime-integration-tests` observed handoff `commitId` value `847ecd8` while the skill requires full SHA.

rejectedObservations.observation: Require startup context-read evidence in handoff before setting followedProcedure=true.
Shared architecture library remains switcher-centric and light on token-accounting/backfill context.
